issues.description: Condition missing: should check if opponent has 5+ cards in hand. Current condition is 'Always' which ignores the hand size requirement.
Action 'DrawCard' should not be present. Card text contains no draw effect. Only TrashFromHand should exist.
Action type 'TrashFromHand' is incorrect. Should be 'ForceDiscard' (opponent discards, not player). Legacy alias 'TrashCard' maps to ForceDiscard.
Action targets opponent, but no target specification in filter. Should clarify opponent is subject.
